case_title: FONG PAMELA VS LINDEMANN ANDREW et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $158.36 FILED BY FONG PAMELA AS TO DEFENDANT LINDEMANN ANDREW LUXOR CABS ATTN MARY WARNER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-25-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LINDEMANN ANDREW LUXOR CABS ATTN MARY WARNER

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FONG PAMELA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LINDEMANN ANDREW LUXOR CABS ATTN MARY WARNER $158.36 PRINCIPAL, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $186.36 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT LINDEMANN ANDREW LUXOR CABS ATTN MARY WARNER
